--- title: "hwpapi" subtitle: "Pythonic automation for HWP (нХЬмїімШ§нФЉмК§ нХЬкЄА)" format: html: toc: false page-layout: full --- ::: {.hwpapi-hero} # hwpapi

A slim Python facade over HWP's COM automation вАФ with dict-like collections, context-managed formatting, and a documented escape hatch to the raw action layer.

```bash pip install hwpapi ``` ::: ## 5-minute tour ::: {#8e1618ed .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} from hwpapi import App # 1. Open a file вАФ `App` owns lifecycle only. with App() as app: app.open("report.hwp") # 2. Everything document-scoped lives under `app.doc`. app.doc.insert_text("Hello, нХЬкЄА!\n") # 3. Collections are dict-like. app.doc.fields["author"] = "нЩНкЄЄлПЩ" for name in app.doc.fields.names(): print(name, "->", app.doc.fields[name].value) # 4. Formatting is a context scope. from hwpapi.context import charshape_scope with charshape_scope(app, bold=True, size=14, color="#C0392B"): app.doc.insert_text("important line\n") # 5. Need a raw action? Drop into `hwpapi.low`. from hwpapi.low import actions # e.g. actions._Action("MovePos")(...) app.save_as("report.pdf") ``` ::: The blocks above are marked `eval: false` because they drive the HWP COM server on Windows. Every other code block on the site that does not need HWP runs at render time. ## What's in the box ::: {.feature-grid} ::: {.feature-card} ### Two-layer API `App` вЖТ `app.doc` for everyday scripts. `hwpapi.low.*` for raw actions and ParameterSet manipulation when you need it. [Guide вЖТ](guide/app-and-document.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: {.feature-card} ### Dict-like collections `fields`, `bookmarks`, `hyperlinks`, `images`, `styles`, `paragraphs`, `tables` вАФ every collection supports `[]`, `in`, `for`, `len`, `filter`, `names`. [Guide вЖТ](guide/collections.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: {.feature-card} ### Context-managed formatting `charshape_scope`, `parashape_scope`, `styled_text` snapshot the cursor's shape on enter and restore it on exit вАФ even if your code raises. [Guide вЖТ](guide/context-scopes.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: {.feature-card} ### Friendly units `hwpapi.units.mm(210)`, `pt(12)`, `inch(8.27)` вАФ no more HWPUNIT arithmetic. [Guide вЖТ](guide/units.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: {.feature-card} ### Real exceptions Every public call wraps `pywintypes.com_error` as an `HwpApiError` subclass with a useful message. [Reference вЖТ](reference/errors.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: {.feature-card} ### Escape hatch, documented `hwpapi.low.actions`, `hwpapi.low.parametersets`, `hwpapi.low.engine` вАФ the 900+ action wrappers and 130+ ParameterSet classes, cleanly namespaced. [Guide вЖТ](guide/low-level-escape-hatch.qmd){.card-link} ::: ::: ## Where to next - **New here?** Start with [Install](getting-started/install.qmd) вЖТ [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.qmd). - **Upgrading from v1?** The [Migration guide](getting-started/migration-v1-to-v2.qmd) has a 1:1 mapping table for every v1 `App` member. - **Looking for a recipe?** See the [Recipes index](recipes/index.qmd). - **Need to look up a symbol?** Jump to the [API Reference](reference/index.qmd). - **Curious why it's shaped this way?** Read the [ADRs](design/adr/adr-001-v2-redesign.qmd).
